name: gmail
description: Google Workspace connector (OAuth2): Gmail read/draft, Calendar read + event create, and read-only Docs/Sheets/Slides.
reauth_note: Adding Docs/Sheets/Slides read + calendar.events write expanded the OAuth scopes. Existing refresh tokens lack the new permissions — re-mint a token with `bun scripts/reauth-gmail.ts` (no need to re-run the full setup wizard). Files are read by explicit ID, so no Drive scope is requested.

secrets.description: OAuth2 refresh token (obtained during setup; must carry the broadened scopes)

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read full content of a specific email

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails with Gmail query syntax

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a Gmail draft for user review

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read a Google Doc as plain text (read-only)

tools.name: read_sheet
tools.description: Read values from a Google Sheet by range (read-only)

tools.name: read_slides
tools.description: Read all text from a Google Slides presentation (read-only)

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create an event on the primary calendar (WRITE — confirm with user; no invites sent)
